issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on the happy path.

scenarios.name: pitch-deck-for-enterprise-ai-tool
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers more of the required slides and includes key elements like market size, traction, and funding ask, whereas Response B only provides a few slides and omits many rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: q4-engineering-review-deck
scenarios.rationale: Response A covers most rubric items but violates design limits; Response B lacks required slides, notes, and visuals.
